title: HNTAS: Existing heat networks - draft assessment procedures for Milestone 2
body: "These draft assessment procedures for existing heat networks detail the activities to be undertaken to verify compliance with Milestone 2 requirements in the upcoming Heat Network Technical Assurance Scheme (HNTAS).    Milestone 2 relates to minimum performance and reliability thresholds, including metering and monitoring requirements.  The documents are for use by:   heat network assessors heat network operators   These assessment procedures correspond to the draft HNTAS technical specifications for Milestone 2.  Next steps  We will be requesting feedback on the information in these documents. We will run a change management process in parallel with the HNTAS technical standards consultation which will launch shortly.  We will make final versions of these documents available before the scheme starts.  "
